To find the total amount of shampoo needed, multiply the number of washes by 1/4 ounce. This will give the total ounces required for the entire year. Since shampoo is sold in 14-ounce bottles, divide the total ounces needed by 14 to determine how many bottles Brittany will need. If there is a remainder, she will need an additional bottle to cover the remaining amount.

To ensure she has enough shampoo for the entire leap year, Brittany should purchase [number] bottles. This calculation assumes no waste or changes in her shampoo usage habits.
